caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden podium, delivering a speech in front of a textured, dark green stone wall. He is dressed in a white kurta and a light-colored Nehru vest. Two black microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. To his left, a tall gold-colored cylindrical pillar with red flowers at the top stands against the wall. In the initial sequence, he stands still and speaks, looking slightly to his right. As the scene progresses, he raises his left hand in a gesturing motion, extending his arm upward and outward to emphasize a point while continuing to speak. The background remains static throughout the sequence, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos.
